theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, calm, and highly focused learning environment. Blends the editorial sophistication of Notion/Linear with an academic, trusting vibe to reduce the stress of IELTS preparation. Avoids generic SaaS purple/blue.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter. Use tight letter spacing for headings and generous line height for reading passages.

heading.usage: H1-H4, Testimonials, Hero Headlines, Score Numbers. Brings an academic, trustworthy, and editorial feel.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, Dashboard labels, Buttons. Clean, geometric, and modern to balance the serif.

background.description: Bone white/Warm pearl for the main app background to reduce eye strain during long reading/writing sessions. Pure white for cards and focus areas.

text.description: Deep Forest Black instead of pure #000000 for a softer, organic contrast.

accents.description: Rich Forest Green for primary actions (trust/growth). Terracotta for the AI Voice Orb, warnings, and alerts. Muted Gold for streaks and success highlights.

marketing_page.hero: Generous spacing. Hero text on left (col-span-7), abstract nature texture or student image on right (col-span-5) with a slight offset. No heavy box shadows.
marketing_page.components: Custom HTML/Tailwind for layouts, heavily utilize padding (p-12 to p-24) to create breathing room.

dashboard.grid: Control Room Grid. Dense, strictly aligned. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
dashboard.cards: Subtle Neumorphism or Flat with 1px border. bg-white, border-[#E5E5E5], rounded-xl. Shadow only on hover.

practice_room.layout: Minimalist Zen layout. Max-w-3xl centered. Distraction-free.
practice_room.writing_editor: Looks like an editorial notepad. High line-height (leading-loose), max-w-prose for optimal reading.

ai_tutor_orb.visuals: A central, breathing orb representing the AI mentor.
ai_tutor_orb.colors: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#E07A5F] to-[#E9C46A] (Terracotta to Gold) for a warm, humanistic feel.
ai_tutor_orb.animation: Framer motion scale and opacity pulse during 'Listening' state. Audio waveform during 'Speaking' state.
ai_tutor_orb.transcript: Real-time transcript fades in smoothly below the orb. User text aligned right (muted grey bg), AI text aligned left (transparent bg, bold serif font).

score_visualization.overall_band: Large bold serif typography (e.g., '7.5') enclosed in a circular SVG progress dial (stroke color: #2D6A4F).
score_visualization.skills_breakdown: Use Recharts to render a Radar Chart for the 4 skills (Fluency, Lexical, Grammar, Pronunciation) to show balance, or crisp horizontal progress bars.
score_visualization.history: Line chart showing band score progression over time, removing grid lines for a cleaner, editorial look.

component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Customize to have rounded-lg and focus:ring-[#2D6A4F].
component_instructions.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary uses bg-[#2D6A4F]. Add hover lift (-translate-y-0.5) and transition-transform.
component_instructions.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Override fixed heights. Use for switching between Task 1 / Task 2 in Writing.
component_instructions.testing: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="start-speaking-btn"`, `data-testid="target-band-select"`).

image_urls.description: Student studying with a laptop. Use for the Landing Page Hero section to establish context.
Asian student smiling with a laptop. Use in the Testimonials or Success Stories section to build trust with the target demographic.
Smiling individual. Use for user avatars in testimonials or mock dashboard profiles.
Minimalist abstract texture. Use as a soft background overlay (with low opacity) in the AI Speaking Practice room to create a calm atmosphere.
